productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual Red Flip Flop
description: These unique chilly red numero uno flip flops with white stripes and gold lettering is the perfect way to elevate summer casuals. Wear these with your jeans or any other casuals and bring it alive with its lively colour.Upper Rubber thong straps with rubber toe separator for added comfort, support and durabilityStraps embossed with branding Midsole Soft footbed with striped graphics for funky look and impact protection Outsole Ridged rubber outsole for good grip and traction shoe careDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
